name: chain-state-watcher
description: Alerts when OrchestKit chain state becomes stale (>30min) during multi-phase skills
command: parse_iso() { python3 -c "import sys,datetime;print(int(datetime.datetime.fromisoformat(sys.argv[1].replace('Z','+00:00')).timestamp()))" "$1" 2>/dev/null || date -jf '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S' "${1%%.*}" +%s 2>/dev/null || date -d "$1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0; }; while true; do if [ -f .claude/chain/state.json ]; then updated=$(cat .claude/chain/state.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"updated":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4); if [ -n "$updated" ]; then now=$(date -u +%s); then_ts=$(parse_iso "$updated"); diff=$((now - then_ts)); if [ "$diff" -gt 1800 ]; then skill=$(cat .claude/chain/state.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"skill":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4); phase=$(cat .claude/chain/state.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"current_phase":[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2); echo "Chain state stale: /ork:${skill:-unknown} phase ${phase:-?} unchanged for $((diff/60))min — consider /recap or resume"; fi; fi; fi; sleep 300; done

name: goal-convergence
description: Reports rolling /goal convergence stats (converged/spun/aborted + avg turns) from .claude/state/goal-history.jsonl every 60s.
command: while true; do f=.claude/state/goal-history.jsonl; if [ -f "$f" ]; then awk -F'"' 'BEGIN{c=0;s=0;a=0;t=0;n=0} /"status":"converged"/{c++} /"status":"spun"/{s++} /"status":"aborted"/{a++} /"turn_count":/{for(i=1;i<=NF;i++) if($i=="turn_count"){match($(i+1),/[0-9]+/);if(RSTART){v=substr($(i+1),RSTART,RLENGTH)+0;t+=v;n++}}} END{total=c+s+a; if(total==0){print "no /goal runs yet"} else {avg=(n>0)?int(t/n+0.5):0; printf "last %d /goal: %d\u2713 %d\u21bb %d\u2717 avg %dt\n", total, c, s, a, avg}}' "$f"; fi; sleep 60; done

name: uncommitted-work-reminder
description: Periodic reminder when significant uncommitted changes accumulate. Suppressed for 5 min after each commit and when the file count is unchanged from the previous poll (avoids nag-spam when user is actively editing the same set).
command: sleep 600; prev_count=0; while true; do changed=$(git diff --stat 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | grep -o '[0-9]* file' | grep -o '[0-9]*' || echo 0); last_commit=$(git log -1 --format=%ct 2>/dev/null || echo 0); now=$(date +%s); since_commit=$((now - last_commit)); if [ "$changed" -gt 10 ] && [ "$since_commit" -gt 300 ] && [ "$changed" != "$prev_count" ]; then echo "$changed files with uncommitted changes — consider /ork:commit to save progress"; fi; prev_count=$changed; sleep 900; done
